steps.title: Recognize percentage growth
steps.content:
Each year, the account has $3.4\%$ more money than the year before. A repeated percent increase means the amount is multiplied by the same factor each year:
$$1+0.034=1.034$$

steps.title: Classify the model
steps.content:
Repeated multiplication by a constant factor gives an exponential model. Since the factor is greater than $1$, the amount grows over time:
$$A(t)=125(1.034)^t$$Because $1.034>1$, the model is increasing. The answer is C.
